2605.10120.title: MicroWorld: Empowering Multimodal Large Language Models to Bridge the Microscopic Domain Gap with Multimodal Attribute Graph
2605.10120.paper_summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show remarkable potential for scientific reasoning, yet their performance in specialized domains such as microscopy remains limited by the scarcity of domain-specific training data and the difficulty of encoding fine-grained expert knowledge into model parameters. To bridge the gap, we introduce MicroWorld, a framework that constructs a multimodal attributed property graph (MAPG) from large-scale scientific image--caption corpora and leverages it to augment MLLM reasoning at inference time without any domain-specific fine-tuning. MicroWorld extracts biomedical entities and relations via scispaCy or LLM-based triplet mining, aligns images and entities in a shared embedding space using Qwen3-VL-Embedding, and assembles a knowledge graph comprising approximately 111K nodes and 346K typed edges spanning eight relation categories. At inference time, a graph-augmented retrieval pipeline matches query entities to the MAPG and injects structured knowledge context into the MLLM prompt. On the MicroVQA benchmark, MicroWorld improves the reasoning performance of Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct by 37.5%, outperforming GPT-5 by 13.0% to achieve a new state-of-the-art. Furthermore, it yields a 6.0% performance gain on the MicroBench benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate the enhanced generalization capability introduced by MicroWorld. A qualitative case study further reveals both the mechanisms through which structured knowledge improves reasoning and the failure modes that point to promising future directions. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ieellee/MicroWorld.
2605.10120.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在科學推理方面顯示出卓越的潛力，然而它們在顯微鏡等專業領域的表現仍然受到專業領域訓練數據稀缺和將細緻的專家知識編碼到模型參數中的困難的限制。為了彌補這一差距，我們推出了MicroWorld，一個從大規模科學圖像--標題語料庫構建多模態屬性圖（MAPG）的框架，並利用它在推理時增強MLLM推理，而無需任何專業領域的微調。MicroWorld通過scispaCy或基於LLM的三元組挖掘提取生物醫學實體和關係，使用Qwen3-VL-Embedding將圖像和實體對齊到共享嵌入空間，並組裝一個包含約111K節點和346K類型邊的知識圖，涵蓋八個關係類別。在推理時，一個圖增強檢索管道將查詢實體與MAPG匹配，並將結構化知識上下文注入到MLLM提示中。在MicroVQA基準測試中，MicroWorld將Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct的推理性能提高了37.5%，超越了GPT-5 13.0%，達到新的最先進水平。此外，它在MicroBench基準測試中也獲得了6.0%的性能提升。廣泛的實驗展示了MicroWorld所帶來的增強泛化能力。一個定性案例研究進一步揭示了結構化知識如何改善推理的機制以及指向有前景未來方向的失敗模式。代碼和數據可在 https://github.com/ieellee/MicroWorld 獲得。
2605.10120.author: Manyu Li et.al.
2605.10120.authors: Manyu Li, Ruian He, Chenxi Ma, Weimin Tan, Bo Yan
